mapper.sql: dorm_fee_id, region, dormitory_id, room_id, employee_id, target_year_month, move_in_date, move_out_date, usage_type_code, usage_days, unit_price_id, daily_unit_price, amount, residence_history_id, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

df.dorm_fee_id, df.region, rg.name AS region_name, df.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, df.room_id, r.room_name, df.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, df.target_year_month, df.move_in_date, df.move_out_date, rh.move_out_date AS residence_move_out_date, df.usage_type_code, ut.name AS usage_type_name, df.usage_days, df.unit_price_id, up.code AS unit_price_code, df.daily_unit_price, df.amount, df.residence_history_id, df.status, df.created_at, df.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_fee ( dorm_fee_id, region, dormitory_id, room_id, employee_id, target_year_month, move_in_date, move_out_date, usage_type_code, usage_days, unit_price_id, daily_unit_price, amount, residence_history_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{dormFeeId}, #{region}, #{dormitoryId}, #{roomId}, #{employeeId}, #{targetYearMonth}, #{moveInDate}, #{moveOutDate}, #{usageTypeCode}, #{usageDays}, #{unitPriceId}, #{dailyUnitPrice}, #{amount}, #{residenceHistoryId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE dorm_fee SET region = #{region}, dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}, room_id = #{roomId}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, target_year_month = #{targetYearMonth}, move_in_date = #{moveInDate}, move_out_date = #{moveOutDate}, usage_type_code = #{usageTypeCode}, usage_days = #{usageDays}, unit_price_id = #{unitPriceId}, daily_unit_price = #{dailyUnitPrice}, amount = #{amount}, residence_history_id = #{residenceHistoryId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE dorm_fee_id = #{dormFeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM dorm_fee WHERE dorm_fee_id = #{dormFeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
